<!-- pr-type: minor -->

## Summary

Updates the password reset success message to tell users to check their junk/spam folder if they don't see the email.

**Before:** `Check your email for a reset link. The link will expire shortly for security.`
**After:** `Check your email for a reset link. If you do not see it, check your junk or spam folder. The link will expire shortly for security.`

## Scope

- `app/forgot-password/page.tsx` — success message text only (line 103)
- No runtime, pipeline, evaluation, or scoring code touched

## Risk

Typo-level copy change. No runtime path, no scoring change, no API modification.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

Typo-only — no runtime risk.
